author: vvo
subject: v0.8.2
body: ## [0.8.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v0.8.1...v0.8.2) (2015-11-04) ### Bug Fixes * **doc:** All wigdets in docs are not anymore linked together #fix #446 ([4361320](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/4361320)), closes [#446](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/446) * **hitsPerPageSelector:** Issue when state did not have a `hitsPerPage` ([dc9371c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/dc9371c))
